g.text: 40 Projects — Roadmap Kỹ Sư Không Thể Thay Thế
Phase 1-4 (19) | Senior | Senior backend, infra engineer
Phase 1-6 (30) | Senior @ BigTech | Google L5, Meta E5, systems
Phase 1-7 (36) | Senior + ML Infra | NVIDIA, ML infra @ big tech
ML Systems | neural-net(31) → transformer(32) → gpu-compute(33) → ml-serving(35) → dist-training(36)
1 | tokenizer | Parsing mindset, máy tính đọc code
6 | build-kernel-module| Code chạy trong kernel space
7 | container-basic | Namespaces, cgroups, bản chất Docker

14 | profiler-tool | CPU sampling, flame graphs, perf
25 | cache-optimized-structures| Cache line, prefetch, struct layout
26 | lock-free-structures | CAS, atomics, concurrency no lock
30 | zero-copy-msg-bus | Eliminate memcpy, IPC max speed
32 | transformer-scratch | Attention, hiểu LLM từ gốc
37 | build-redis | Network server + data structures + persistence
39 | build-os | Full OS kernel, scheduler, syscalls
40 | build-jit | JIT compiler, generate native code
